headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com; worker-src 'self' blob: https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://unpkg.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
